---
title: 'Just had to relearn this lesson again: #BeStillBeLed'
date: '2016-02-14T05:04:00.0000000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: 'Darrell Wolfe, Storyteller'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '5277526890085258569'
blogger_filename: '/2016/02/just-had-to-relearn-this-lesson-again.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/Darrell Wolfe, Storyteller/feed.atom'
categories:
  - 'Randomness'
  - 'Stories'
  - 'Armchair Theology'
---

<br />So I spent most of today revamping a page on my site: "<a href="http://www.darrellwolfe.com/p/got-freedom.html" target="_blank">Got LIFE?</a>"<br /><br />Here is an excerpt:<br /><br /><blockquote class="tr_bq"><span style="font-family: inherit;">Paradise Lost (<a href="http://biblehub.com/esv/genesis/3.htm" target="_blank">Gen 3</a>)</span>&nbsp;</blockquote><blockquote class="tr_bq"><span style="font-family: inherit;"></span>Light shinning through the misty sky had dimmed. Evening arrived. Ish was sitting on the lawn, petting Kuf (his pet Monkey). Ishta was braiding the hair of her favorite Lion, Aryeh.&nbsp;</blockquote><blockquote class="tr_bq"><span style="font-weight: normal;">Ish could feel his strength waning, as it tended to do this time of day. He took from the LIFE tree, and ate. A cool rush of strength flowed through his veins. Ishta took from the LIFE Fruit, and sat next to him. They lay under the the first stars peeping through, and fell asleep.</span></blockquote><blockquote class="tr_bq">... to continue click (<a href="http://www.darrellwolfe.com/p/got-freedom.html" target="_blank">here</a>).</blockquote><br />Something occurred to me. It's simple, yet profound.<br /><br /><blockquote class="tr_bq"><i>Sometimes you don't need to discover new answers. You just need to remember the answers you already discovered, and live them.</i></blockquote><br />It could be said that 90-100% of the problems I'm going through mentally and emotionally could be solved if I lived what I wrote on that page several years ago. I revamped the page today, and upgraded the story-telling.<br /><br />However, most of what's there is what was there already.<br /><br />If I'm experiencing a lack of LIFE, then getting into HIS presence is the key.<br /><br />So simple.<br /><br />I suggest you click on the link above and read it, I was preaching to myself.<br /><br /><blockquote class="tr_bq"><b>Just had to relearn this lesson again:&nbsp;</b>#<a href="http://ctt.ec/5xc67" target="_blank">BeStillBeLed</a></blockquote><br /><h4><br /></h4><div><h4>Your Turn: That was my story, what's your story?</h4><h4><blockquote class="tr_bq" style="font-weight: normal;">Tell the LIFE community about a story you encountered this week, and what you learned from it.&nbsp;</blockquote><br />Go to&nbsp;<a href="http://darrellwolfe.com/">DarrellWolfe.Com</a>, and c<b>omment on this at the bottom of this post.</b><div style="font-weight: normal;"><b><br /></b><b>Or, Hit me up on Twitter&nbsp;<a href="https://twitter.com/darrellwolfe" target="_blank">@DarrellWolfe&nbsp;</a>,&nbsp;Google&nbsp;<a class="g-profile" href="https://plus.google.com/106337514196493406365" target="_blank">+DarrellWolfe</a>, Facebook&nbsp;<a href="https://www.facebook.com/groups/907869989282584/" target="_blank">DarrellGWolfe</a>,</b></div></h4><blockquote class="tr_bq"><b>Tweet These:</b><br />#<a href="http://ctt.ec/8E5X7" target="_blank">TellYourStory</a>#<a href="http://ctt.ec/5xc67" target="_blank">BeStillBeLed</a></blockquote><br /><h4>By&nbsp;<a href="https://plus.google.com/+DarrellWolfe/posts" target="_blank">Darrell Wolfe</a></h4><blockquote class="tr_bq"><i>Storyteller, Creative,&nbsp;<a href="http://www.16personalities.com/infj-personality" target="_blank">INFJ</a>,&nbsp;<a href="https://www.gallupstrengthscenter.com/Purchase/en-US/Product?Path=Clifton%20StrengthsFinder" target="_blank">Intellection</a>, Ideation, Input, Learner, Achiever</i></blockquote><div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;"></div><i><br /></i><hr color="black" noshade="" /><div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;"></div><div><br /><div><ul><li><span style="font-family: &quot;georgia&quot; , &quot;times new roman&quot; , serif;"><a href="http://www.darrellwolfe.com/p/about-20.html" target="_blank">New Here? Start HERE</a></span></li><li><span style="font-family: &quot;georgia&quot; , &quot;times new roman&quot; , serif;"><a href="http://www.darrellwolfe.com/p/got-freedom.html" target="_blank">Got LIFE?</a></span></li><li><a href="http://eepurl.com/MzAVr" target="_blank">Sign up for email delivery of these posts here</a>.&nbsp;</li><li><a href="http://www.darrellwolfe.com/p/blog-page_27.html" target="_blank">Links to Resources</a></li><li><a href="http://www.darrellwolfe.com/p/my-tool-box.html" target="_blank">My Tool Box</a></li><li><a href="http://www.darrellwolfe.com/p/books-resources.html" target="_blank">Book Suggestions</a></li><li><a href="http://www.darrellwolfe.com/p/banking-basics-for-believers-book-by.html" target="_blank">Click Here To Get My Book: "Banking Basics for Believers"</a>, which guides you through the basics of banking and money from a Christian Perspective.&nbsp;</li></ul><div><div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;"><a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/cover-art-e0f7cc956c34.png" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" height="145" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/cover-art-267bc6b1d8d3.png" width="200" /></a></div><br /></div><div></div><div></div></div><div><b>For more book suggestions, see my Amazon Store:</b></div><div><br /></div><div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;"><a href="http://astore.amazon.com/your0f4d-20" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;" target="_blank"><img border="0" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/amazon-button-8fb3d7b755c7.gif" /></a></div><div><br /></div><div><br /></div><b>Other Hobby Sties by Darrell:</b><br /><br /><ul><li><a href="http://discerningthetime.blogspot.com/" target="_blank">http://discerningthetime.blogspot.com</a></li><ul><li>End Times Prophecy Study</li></ul><li><a href="http://authorfun.blogspot.com/" target="_blank">http://authorfun.blogspot.com</a></li><ul><li>Fiction and Flash Fiction Practice</li></ul><li><a href="http://www.lifeinfortworth.com/" target="_blank">http://www.lifeinfortworth.com</a></li><ul><li>Discover, Navigate, and Enjoy Fort Worth Texas. Reviews</li></ul></ul></div>.<br /><br /><div class="addthis_sharing_toolbox"></div><br />.</div>
